# Ontology ‚Äî presets, patches, projects, shared links

User-facing terms for what amorph stores and shares.

## Core entities

| Term | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| **Patch** | The `.amorph` product unit ‚Äî DSP, UI, parameters, metadata |
| **Preset** | A named snapshot inside a patch (preset strip in Play) |
| **Project folder** | `Projects/<PresetName>/` on disk ‚Äî breakout `dsp.cmajor`, `index.js`, `.vscode/mcp.json` |
| **Shared link** | Unlisted URL `https://share.artistsindsp.com/p/{uuid}` ‚Äî install via Explore |
| **Community patch** | Catalog entry browsable in Explore ‚Üí Community (distinct from unlisted share links) |
| **Local patch** | On-disk patch in `~/Library/Presets/Artists_in_DSP/AMORPH/` |

## Top tabs (one plugin instance)

**Play** ‚Äî perform with the loaded patch ¬∑ **Build** ‚Äî edit and compile ¬∑ **Explore** ‚Äî browse, install, shared links

## Three plugin binaries (not switchable)

Amorph Instrument (MIDI‚Üíaudio), Amorph FX (audio‚Üíaudio), Amorph MIDI (MIDI‚ÜíMIDI).
Each is a separate VST3/AU ‚Äî load the correct binary for the track type.

## Three layers

| Layer | What it is |
|-------|------------|
| **Platform** | amorph: language ‚Üí playable, ownable DSP |
| **Runtimes** | DAW plugins: `Amorph_Instrument` (MIDI‚Üíaudio), `Amorph_FX` (audio‚Üíaudio), `Amorph_MIDI` (MIDI‚ÜíMIDI). MCP variants: `instrument`, `fx`, `midi`. |
| **Patch** | Live Cmajor inside a runtime, no export step, no separate plugin binary |
